brand.tagline: Benefits you want. Talent you deserve.

landing.headline: Benefits your people choose.
landing.subtitle: PERX is the benefits marketplace that turns a company's budget into experiences employees actually love — wellness, food, sport, travel and more, all in one beautiful place.
landing.howTitle: From budget to benefit in four taps
landing.howSubtitle: PERX keeps the flow simple for employees while giving HR the controls, approvals, and insight they need behind the scenes.
landing.how1: HR sets a yearly benefits budget per employee — no spreadsheets, no reimbursements.
landing.how2: Browse a curated marketplace of local partners and build their own benefit package.
landing.how3: An AI concierge matches benefits to each person's lifestyle and remaining budget.
landing.how4: Requests flow to HR, get approved instantly, and the benefit goes live.
landing.marketTitle: A benefit catalog that feels local, useful, and alive.
landing.marketBody: Employees can mix everyday needs with experiences they would actually look forward to: lunch, therapy, fitness, weekend travel, learning, and moments of self-care.
landing.marketPoint1: Budgets are visible, easy to spend, and tied to real local offers.
landing.marketPoint2: The assistant explains options, compares prices, and helps employees use their budget wisely.
landing.marketPoint3: Streaks, spins, and surprise bonuses turn engagement into extra value.
landing.personasTitle: Employees, companies, and providers all get a clearer path.
landing.personasSubtitle: The marketplace only works when every side wins: people find value, HR gets control, and local partners meet the right audience.
landing.forEmployeesBody: Your benefits, your call. Spend your budget on what actually matters to you — and earn more through streaks and games.
landing.forCompaniesBody: See exactly what your people love, control budgets per department, and discover new local partners with the AI Deals Engine.
landing.forProvidersBody: Reach engaged employees across Albania. Get matched to the companies whose teams want exactly what you offer.
landing.controlTitle: The friendly front end has a serious operating layer.
landing.controlBody: PERX makes the employee experience feel generous without losing policy control. Finance and HR can see spend, set rules, and approve requests without turning benefits into paperwork.
landing.control1: Set annual budgets, category limits, and department rules from one admin workspace.
landing.control2: Track spend by category, request status, engagement, and the benefits people love most.
landing.control3: The Deals Engine ranks nearby providers by fit, distance, and predicted usage.
landing.footerCta: Ready to make benefits feel like a gift?
landing.heroQrCaption: Each benefit gets its own single-use QR code.
landing.footerNote: Built for JunctionX Tirana 2026 · A TeamSystem challenge

features.title: Everything benefits
features.subtitle: PERX turns a company’s budget into experiences employees actually love — powered by a curated marketplace, an AI concierge, and a little bit of play.

core.title: Flexible benefit budgets
core.body: HR funds a yearly wallet per employee. No reimbursements, no spreadsheets — just a balance people can spend on what they love.

core.title: Curated marketplace
core.body: A hand-picked catalog of local Albanian partners across wellness, food, sport, travel, learning and more — all in one beautiful place.

core.title: Perky AI concierge
core.body: A conversational assistant that matches benefits to each person’s lifestyle and remaining budget, and answers questions instantly.

core.title: One-tap approvals
core.body: Requests flow straight to HR, get approved in a tap, and the benefit goes live immediately — with a clean audit trail.

core.title: Games & rewards
core.body: Streaks, scratch cards and spin-to-win turn staying healthy and engaged into extra budget. Benefits that feel like a gift.

core.title: Insightful analytics
core.body: See exactly what your people love, spend by category, and engagement over time — the data HR has always wanted.

core.title: Smart Deals Engine
core.body: AI ranks nearby partners by how well they match your team’s tastes, so you discover the right local deals automatically.

core.title: Policy & controls
core.body: Per-department budgets, category rules and approval policies keep finance in control without slowing anyone down.

core.title: Timely nudges
core.body: Seasonal offers, approval updates and streak reminders keep employees engaged — never spammy, always opt-in.

features.marketTitle: Benefits across every part of life
features.marketSubtitle: Category accents you’ll recognise from pins, chips and charts throughout the product.

personas.title: For Employees

features.ctaTitle: See it for yourself in eight seconds
features.ctaBody: Sign in with a demo account and explore the full PERX experience — marketplace, Perky AI, games and the admin Deals Engine.

about.title: Benefits, reimagined for
about.subtitle: PERX is a two-sided employee benefits marketplace for Albania — premium fintech meets warm concierge. We turn budgets into experiences people actually love.
about.missionTitle: Make benefits feel like a gift.
missionParagraphs: Most benefits programs are a maze of reimbursements, vouchers and forgotten allowances. The money is there — but the experience is cold, and half the budget goes unused.

PERX flips that. Companies fund a wallet, employees explore a curated marketplace of local partners, and an AI concierge named Perky helps everyone spend wisely. A little play — streaks, scratch cards, spins — turns staying engaged into extra budget.
The result reads like Tirana at dusk: dark, warm light sources, gold and ember glows on stone. Albanian identity, without the cliché.

brand.title: Stone & dusk
brand.body: The neutral base is pulled from the Albanian Alps — deep slate, near-black and cool greys at last light.

brand.title: Ember
brand.body: A sophisticated, slightly desaturated descendant of flag red. Heritage, signalled — never shouted.

brand.title: Aged gold
brand.body: The double-headed eagle rendered as a premium metallic accent for rewards, streaks and wins.

values.title: People first
values.body: Benefits should feel like a gift, not a form. Every decision starts with the person opening the app, not the spreadsheet behind it.

values.title: Quiet premium
values.body: Calm, confident and expensive-looking — never corporate-cold. We sweat the radius, the glow and the curve of every motion.

values.title: Local by design
values.body: We champion Albanian providers and the experiences that make life here good. Discovery is rooted in the streets of Tirana.

values.title: Two-sided by nature
values.body: Employees, companies and providers all win at once — or the marketplace doesn’t work. We build for the whole loop.

timeline.title: The idea
timeline.body: Albanian teams deserved benefits that felt modern. We sketched a two-sided marketplace built dark-first and mobile-first.

timeline.title: Built in 48 hours
timeline.body: PERX came to life for JunctionX Tirana 2026 as a TeamSystem challenge — a real product a judge could love in eight seconds.

timeline.title: Beyond the demo
timeline.body: Deeper partner discovery, richer Perky recommendations, and the analytics every HR team has always wanted.

about.ctaTitle: Want to bring PERX to your team?
about.ctaBody: We’d love to show you what modern benefits feel like. Reach out and we’ll set you up.

pricing.title: Simple pricing,
pricing.subtitle: Pay for the platform, not the paperwork. Every plan includes the full marketplace and Perky AI — you choose the controls and scale.

plans.name: Starter
plans.tagline: For small teams trying benefits the modern way.

plans.name: Growth
plans.tagline: For growing companies that want control and insight.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.tagline: For larger organisations with bespoke policy needs.

faq.a: Companies fund a yearly wallet per employee. Employees spend it across the marketplace — no reimbursements, no vouchers, no leftover allowance lost to paperwork.
Local partners join free and only benefit from reaching engaged employees. We never charge employees a cent — the company funds everything.
Yes. On Growth and Enterprise, finance can set budgets and approval policies per department, with a clean audit trail on every request.
Starter is free forever. Paid plans are monthly with no lock-in — scale up or down as your team changes.

pricing.ctaTitle: Ready to make benefits feel like a gift?
pricing.ctaBody: Start free in minutes, or talk to us about rolling PERX out across your whole company.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: Your data is yours. Here’s exactly what we collect, why, and the control you have over it — in plain language.

sections.heading: Overview
body: PERX (“we”, “us”) operates a two-sided employee benefits marketplace. This policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, and the choices you have. We keep it plain — no dark patterns, no surprises.
This is a demonstration product built for JunctionX Tirana 2026. In a production deployment, this policy would be reviewed by counsel and adapted to your jurisdiction.

sections.heading: Data we collect
body: We collect only what we need to run your benefits program:
Account details — name, work email, company and department.
Benefit activity — budget, requests, approvals and the partners you choose.
Preferences — categories you care about and dietary or lifestyle settings you set.
Product usage — basic, aggregated interaction data to improve the experience.

sections.heading: How we use it
body: Your data powers the product and nothing more:
To run the marketplace, process approvals and track budgets.
To let Perky, our AI concierge, recommend benefits that fit your life and remaining budget.
To give your HR team aggregated insight into what teams love — never individual surveillance.
To keep the service secure and to comply with legal obligations.
We do not sell your personal data. Ever.

sections.heading: Sharing & partners
body: Your employer can see aggregated program data and the approval requests you submit to them — that is how approvals work. Local partners receive only what is needed to deliver a benefit you chose.
We use a small number of trusted infrastructure providers (hosting, analytics) bound by data-processing terms. They act on our instructions only.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: You are in control of your data. Subject to applicable law you can:
Access the personal data we hold about you.
Correct anything inaccurate from your preferences and profile.
Request deletion of your account and associated data.
Object to or restrict certain processing, and export your data.
To exercise any of these, contact us at privacy@perx.al.

sections.heading: Security & retention
body: We protect data with encryption in transit, access controls and the principle of least privilege. No system is perfectly secure, but we treat your data as we would our own.

We retain data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the service and meet legal requirements. When you delete your account, we remove or anonymise your personal data within a reasonable period.

sections.heading: Cookies
body: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and remember your language and preferences. We do not use advertising trackers. You can clear cookies at any time in your browser settings.

sections.heading: Changes & contact
body: We may update this policy as the product evolves. Material changes will be highlighted in-app. Continued use after an update means you accept the revised policy.
Questions or requests? Email privacy@perx.al and a human will respond.

terms.title: Terms of
terms.intro: The agreement between you and PERX. Clear, fair, and written to be read — not buried.

sections.heading: Acceptance of terms
body: By accessing or using PERX, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you are using PERX on behalf of a company, you confirm you have authority to bind that company to these terms.
PERX is a demonstration product built for JunctionX Tirana 2026. A production deployment would adapt these terms to the relevant jurisdiction and contracts.

sections.heading: The service
body: PERX is a two-sided marketplace that lets companies fund employee benefit budgets, lets employees spend them across a curated catalog of local partners, and provides an AI concierge and analytics.
We may improve, change or discontinue features over time. We aim to give reasonable notice of significant changes.

sections.heading: Accounts & eligibility
body: You are responsible for the accuracy of your account information and for keeping your credentials secure. You must notify us of any unauthorised use of your account.
Accounts are provisioned through your employer’s program. Demo accounts are provided for evaluation only.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
body: To keep PERX safe and fair for everyone, you agree not to:
Misuse budgets, attempt to defraud partners, or abuse rewards and games.
Reverse-engineer, scrape, or disrupt the service or its security.
Upload unlawful content or infringe the rights of others.
Use the service to harass other users, partners or staff.

sections.heading: Budgets, benefits & payments
body: Benefit budgets are funded and governed by your employer. Available balance, approval rules and category policies are set by your company’s administrators.
Benefits are delivered by independent local partners. While we curate partners carefully, the experience itself is provided by them, subject to their own terms.
Rewards earned through streaks and games have no cash value and may expire or change at our discretion.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
body: PERX, its design, brand and software are owned by us and protected by applicable law. These terms grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable right to use the service — nothing more.
Partner names and logos belong to their respective owners and are used to identify their offerings.

sections.heading: Disclaimers & liability
body: The service is provided “as is”. To the maximum extent permitted by law we disclaim implied warranties and are not liable for indirect or consequential losses arising from your use of the service.
Nothing in these terms limits liability that cannot be limited by law.

sections.heading: Termination
body: You may stop using PERX at any time. We may suspend or terminate access if these terms are breached or if required to protect the service or other users.
On termination, your right to use the service ends; provisions that by nature should survive (such as IP and liability) will continue.

sections.heading: Governing law & contact
body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Albania, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Disputes will be handled by the competent courts of Tirana.
Questions about these terms? Email legal@perx.al.

fitlife.name: FitLife Gym Tirana
fitlife.blurb: Full-service gym in Blloku — weights, classes, sauna.
fitlife.description: FitLife is a full-service gym in the heart of Blloku with free weights, machine circuits, group classes, and a sauna. Your PERX benefit covers monthly access so you can train before work or unwind after hours. Staff can help with a starter program if you're new.

kombi.name: Kombi Coffee
kombi.blurb: Specialty coffee subscription across 6 Tirana spots.
kombi.description: Kombi Coffee runs six specialty cafés across Tirana. This subscription gives you a monthly coffee allowance you can use at any location — ideal for morning rituals or client meetings. Seasonal drinks and pastries are included at partner pricing.

aquaspa.name: Aqua Spa Tirana
aquaspa.description: Aqua Spa offers thermal pools, hammam rituals, and massage treatments designed for deep recovery. The day-pass covers pool access plus one treatment slot. Book ahead on weekends — PERX members get priority waitlist placement.

langschool.name: Tirana Language School
langschool.blurb: English, German & Italian — small evening groups.
langschool.description: Evening group courses in English, German, and Italian with small class sizes and conversational focus. Perfect if you want structured learning without sacrificing your workday. Materials and placement test are included.

greensalad.name: Green Salad Bar
greensalad.blurb: Build-your-own healthy bowls, delivered to the office.
greensalad.description: Build-your-own bowls with local produce, vegan proteins, and office delivery. The monthly plan covers several lunches — great for teams trying to eat cleaner during busy weeks. Custom macros available on request.

albtransport.name: Albtransport Travel
albtransport.description: Discounted intercity routes and curated weekend trips to the coast. Credits apply to scheduled departures from Tirana; seasonal routes to Sarandë and Vlorë are highlighted in the app during summer.

medicheck.name: MediCheck Clinic
medicheck.description: A comprehensive annual screening with blood panel, vitals, and a GP consult. Results arrive within 48 hours with optional tele-follow-up. Ideal as a once-a-year baseline for wellness-focused teams.

booknook.name: BookNook Albania
booknook.description: Unlimited e-books plus one physical title shipped monthly. Curated lists for leadership, fiction, and Albanian authors. Swap your physical pick anytime before the monthly cutoff.

yogaflow.name: YogaFlow Studio
yogaflow.description: Unlimited yoga and breathwork classes with morning and evening slots in central Tirana. Suitable for beginners and experienced practitioners. Mats provided; arrive 10 minutes early for your first session.

burgerlab.name: Burger Lab Tirana
burgerlab.blurb: Cheat-day voucher — smash burgers in Pazari i Ri.
burgerlab.description: A one-time voucher for smash burgers and sides at Burger Lab in Pazari i Ri. Perfect for team celebrations or a well-earned cheat day. Dine-in only; show your PERX QR at the counter.

cyclecity.name: CycleCity Bike Rental
cyclecity.description: Monthly access to city bikes and safety gear for commutes or weekend rides along the Lana. Unlock via the CycleCity app; first-time riders get a free helmet fitting at the Blloku depot.

lumeretreat.name: Lumë Retreat
lumeretreat.blurb: Weekend mountain reset near the Lumë river.
lumeretreat.description: A weekend mountain retreat with guided hikes, meals, and digital detox time near the Lumë river. Includes shared lodging and transport from Tirana. Seasonal availability — book early for spring slots.
